2.label: Motion
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when motion is detected or cancelled (uses Basic command class).

3.label: Tamper
3.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when tampering is detected or cancelled (uses Basic command class).

4.label: Motion BC
4.description: Devices in this group will receive alarm frames when motion is detected or cancelled. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

5.label: Tamper BC
5.description: Devices in this group will receive alarm frames when tampering is detected or cancelled. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

paramInformation.label: Motion Sensor Sensitivity
paramInformation.description: The lower the value, the more sensitive the PIR sensor.

paramInformation.label: After Motion Blind Time
paramInformation.description: Period of time through which the PIR sensor won't detect motion after detecting motion. Time [s] = 0.5 x (value + 1).

paramInformation.label: Motion Pulses Required
paramInformation.description: Sets the number of moves required for the PIR sensor to report motion. The more the value is, the less sensitive it is.

paramInformation.label: Motion Window Time
paramInformation.description: The amount of time the movements specified in parameter #3 need to take place in. The higher the value, the more sensitive the PIR sensor.

paramInformation.label: Motion Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Period of time after which the motion alarm will be cancelled.

paramInformation.label: Motion Day/Night Mode
paramInformation.description: The parameter determines the part of day in which the PIR sensor will be active.

options.label: PIR sensor active during the day only
PIR sensor active during the night only

paramInformation.label: Night/Day Threshold
paramInformation.description: The difference between night and day in terms of light intensity, used in parameter #8.

paramInformation.label: Basic Command Class Configuration
paramInformation.description: Determines the command frames sent to 2nd association group.

paramInformation.label: BASIC ON Command Frame Value
paramInformation.description: The value of 255 allows to turn ON a device.

paramInformation.label: BASIC OFF Command Frame Value
paramInformation.description: The value of 0 allows to turn OFF a device.

paramInformation.label: Tamper Sensitivity
paramInformation.description: Change in g-force acceleration that will result in the tamper alarm, multiply by 0.016g.

paramInformation.label: Tamper Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Time period after which a tamper alarm will be cancelled.

paramInformation.label: Tamper Operating Modes
paramInformation.description: This parameter determines function of the tamper and sent reports

paramInformation.label: Tamper Alarm Cancellation
paramInformation.description: This parameter allows to disable cancellation of the tamper alarm.

paramInformation.label: Tamper Alarm Broadcast Mode
paramInformation.description: Determines whether the tamper alarm frame will be sent in broadcast mode

paramInformation.label: Tamper Backward Compatible Broadcast Mode
paramInformation.description: Determines whether the backward compatible tamper alarm frame will be sent in broadcast mode

paramInformation.label: Illuminance Report Threshold
paramInformation.description: Minimum change in light intensity level resulting in illumination report.

paramInformation.label: Illuminance Report Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval between consecutive illumination reports (sent even when there is no change).

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Threshold
paramInformation.description: The change in temperature resulting in temperature report.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Measuring Interval
paramInformation.description: How often the temperature will be measured

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval between consecutive temperature reports (sent even when there is no change).

paramInformation.label: Temperature Offset
paramInformation.description: The value to be added to the actual measured temperature.

paramInformation.label: LED Signalling Mode
paramInformation.description: How the light behaves after motion has been detected.

options.label: Flashlight mode - LED glows white 10 seconds
Depends on the temperature (Blink again when motion is detected)
White (Blink again when motion is detected)
Red (Blink again when motion is detected)
Green (Blink again when motion is detected)
Blue (Blink again when motion is detected)
Yellow (Blink again when motion is detected)
Cyan (Blink again when motion is detected)
Magenta (Blink again when motion is detected)
LED colour depends on the temperature (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
White (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Red (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Green (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Blue (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Yellow (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Cyan (Blink twice again when motion is detected)
Magenta (Blink twice again when motion is detected)

paramInformation.label: LED Brightness
paramInformation.description: Brightness of the LED when it's on.

paramInformation.label: Low Brightness Illuminance Threshold
paramInformation.description: When the light intensity is below this, the brightness of the light is 1%.

paramInformation.label: High Brightness Illuminance Threshold
paramInformation.description: When the light intensity is above this, the brightness of the light is 100%.

paramInformation.label: Low Temperature Threshold for Blue
paramInformation.description: When the temperature is below this, the light is blue.

paramInformation.label: High Temperature Threshold for Red
paramInformation.description: When the temperature is above this, the light is red.

paramInformation.label: LED Tamper Alarm
paramInformation.description: Indicating mode resembles a police car (white, red and blue)

options.label: LED does not indicate tamper alarm

metadata.inclusion: Quickly, three times press the B-button located inside the casing.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly, three times press the B-button located inside the casing.
metadata.reset:
1. Open the cover.
2. Press and hold the B-button.
3. Wait for the visual indicator to glow yellow, indicating the 2nd menu position.
4. Release the B-button.
5. Click the B-button to confirm the selection.
